name: TJ Verdiglione
title: Licensed Real Estate Salesperson
bio: TJ Verdiglione is a top-producing luxury real estate specialist with Douglas Elliman, bringing deep expertise in the South Florida pre-construction market. His track record of representing the most exclusive development projects in the region is matched by an unwavering commitment to client experience and results.

name: Nicole Melveney
title: Licensed Real Estate Salesperson
bio: Nicole Melveney brings extensive experience in luxury residential real estate to every transaction, offering buyers a seamless and sophisticated acquisition experience from initial inquiry through closing. Her knowledge of the Delray Beach market is unmatched.

name: Kastelo
title: Developer
bio: Kastelo is a boutique real estate development firm focused on crafting exceptional residential experiences in South Florida's most sought-after neighborhoods. With a philosophy centered on quality over quantity, Kastelo developments are defined by architectural integrity, thoughtful site selection, and an uncompromising standard of finish.

name: 4TRO Capital
title: Co-Developer
bio: 4TRO Capital is a real estate investment and development firm bringing institutional-grade capital and operational expertise to best-in-class residential projects across South Florida.

name: RWB-Linares Architecture
title: Architecture
bio: RWB-Linares Architecture brings a refined modernist sensibility to every project — balancing structural boldness with material restraint. The Casa Avenida design responds precisely to its Delray Beach context: coastal light, tropical landscape, and the timeless character of the neighborhood's historic fabric.

name: Stef Leonel Interior Design
title: Interior Design
bio: Stef Leonel Interior Design is known for crafting interiors of quiet luxury — where material selection, proportion, and restraint combine to create spaces that feel both elevated and deeply livable. The Brisa finish package reflects Stef Leonel's signature warmth and coastal refinement.

name: Ava Gray Interiors
title: Interior Design
bio: Ava Gray Interiors specializes in bold, sophisticated residential design with a particular mastery of dark, dramatic palettes. The Noir finish package is a direct expression of Ava Gray's architectural approach to interiors — where depth, texture, and precision come together in spaces of undeniable presence.
